ad_placements.reasoning: Provides a valuable opportunity for players to continue challenging levels, enhancing engagement without frustration.
Encourages players to watch ads voluntarily to boost their currency, aiding progression and maintaining positive retention.
Interstitials after level loss provide a natural break without disrupting gameplay flow.
Non-intrusive placement during store browsing, allowing players to focus on purchasing without distraction.

iap_offers.name: Starter Pack
iap_offers.trigger: first session or first store visit

iap_offers.name: Event Pass
iap_offers.content: Exclusive boosters and currency during event

energy_lives.monetization: Buy 5 extra lives for 100 Crystal Shards or watch a rewarded video for 1 extra life

events.name: Mystic Tournament
events.monetization_role: Encourages competition and spending on boosters for better scores.

events.name: Ancient Collection
events.monetization_role: Promotes engagement and IAP for exclusive items and rewards.

events.name: Limited Time Offer
events.monetization_role: Drives urgency for purchases with time-limited deals and exclusive content.
